backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the PDF spacing audit/fix feature to `frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts` with high confidence and a single test requirement REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Minimal Tailwind base CSS file defining light and dark OKLCH CSS variable tokens for the shadcn-style design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN, then mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a sticky industrial header, hero banner with feature icons, the ReportForm, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Daily field report form managing project info, punch times, personnel, work details, status, notes, and signature with localStorage persistence and PDF export via generatePDF.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity authentication hook and provider that wraps DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app is fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles defining a dark industrial OKLCH color system with accent-yellow/orange tokens, dark-themed form inputs, and component classes for buttons and the signature canvas container.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility that generates a letter-sized PDF Daily Field Report using jsPDF (loaded via CDN), with defined spacing constants, helper functions for section headers and field rows, and structured sections for project info, personnel, work details, and signatures.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Oswald, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow box shadows, and keyframe animations, plus plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, summary, known issues (PDF spacing), and existing feature requests focused on auditing and fixing vertical spacing in the PDF generator output.
